patch.value: Fix red main coverage gate: measure-agent-token-surface.mjs landed without a covering spec

The pm-a22j baseline script scripts/measure-agent-token-surface.mjs was checked in without a spec while the coverage gate includes scripts/**/*.mjs at a global 100% threshold (ADR pm-w13j literal all-src). Its own main CI run (a8c1fc65) was cancelled by the next push (cancel-in-progress concurrency), so the red gate only surfaced on the following completed run (6c55c7f2): lines 99.83%, scripts group 95.4%.

tests/unit/scripts/measure-agent-token-surface.spec.ts covers the script to 100% lines/branches/functions/statements via the createScriptHarness convention (mocked node:child_process, all parser/error/timeout branches); full coverage gate passes locally and on main CI
Coverage gate on main at 100% lines/branches/functions/statements including scripts/**/*.mjs

Added tests/unit/scripts/measure-agent-token-surface.spec.ts (6 tests, createScriptHarness + mocked node:child_process covering parser branches, stderr-exit fallback, PM_BIN override, tools/list variants, MCP error and 30s-timeout paths); script now 100% on all four metrics and full local gate passes 33,962/33,962 lines

author: maintainer-agent
